ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Pretreatment, mid-treatment, post-treatment
timepoint during lab session
Notes: 1 = baseline; 2 = after neutral prompt; 3 = after first unpleaseant prompt; 4 = after second unpleasant prompt

ElementDescription: I have the impression that my body does not belong to me
I have problems hearing, e.g. I hear sounds from nearby as if they come from far away
I have the impression other people or things around me are unreal
I have the impression that my body or parts of it are insensitive to pain
Instructions given for regulating emotions (neutral: no instructions/neutral prompt, maintain: do not change emotions, decrease: decrease negative emotions, baseline: no prompt)
During the last task, I had the impression that my body or a part of it is insensitive to pain
Notes: 0=I have not had this particular feeling; 9=The feeling was very strong

ElementDescription: Timepoint/visit label
Notes: e.g., Baseline, 6-Month Follow Up, Year 2; Morning, At Bedtime

ElementDescription: Just now, I had the impression my body did not belong to me
Notes: 0=I have not had this particular feeling; 9=The feeling was very strong

ElementDescription: Just now, I had problems with listening, for example, I heard sounds from nearby as if they come from far away
Notes: 0=I have not had this particular feeling; 9=The feeling was very strong

ElementDescription: Just now, I had the impression that other people, objects, and the world around me are not real
Notes: 0=I have not had this particular feeling; 9=The feeling was very strong

ElementDescription: Just now, I had the impression that my body or a part of it is insensitive to pain
Notes: 0=I have not had this particular feeling; 9=The feeling was very strong

ElementDescription: During the last task, I had the impression my body did not belong to me
Notes: 0=I have not had this particular feeling; 9=The feeling was very strong

ElementDescription: During the last task, I had problems with listening, for example, I heard sounds from nearby as if they come from far away
Notes: 0=I have not had this particular feeling; 9=The feeling was very strong

Notes: 0=I have not had this particular feeling; 9=The feeling was very strong
